title: ruyschiana integrifolia
intro: Ruyschiana integrifolia, also known as Rauvolfia tetraphylla, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, where it has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Ruyschiana integrifolia include lowering blood pressure, reducing anxiety and stress, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
